debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p > 2)
n r : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero n
i₀ : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input_var : Var (fields n) (F p)
input : fields n (F p)
h_input : Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input
h_assumptions : True
h_holds :
  Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange n fun i => var { index := i₀ + i }) =
    Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapFinRange n fun i => Vector.get input_var (i + Fin.ofNat n r))
⊢ Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange n fun i => var { index := i₀ + i }) = Vector.rotate input r

failed_attempts:
rw [h_holds, ← h_input]
    ext
    simp [Vector.get_rotate, Vector.get_map, Vector.get_mapFinRange]

rw [h_holds]
    ext
    simp [Vector.get_rotate, Vector.get_mapFinRange, ← Vector.get_map, h_input]

rw [h_holds, ← h_input]
    ext
    simp [Vector.get_map, Vector.get_mapFinRange, Vector.get_rotate]

rw [h_holds]
    simp [Vector.map_mapFinRange, Vector.map_get, h_input]
    ext
    simp [Vector.rotate, Vector.get_mapFinRange]

rw [h_holds, ←h_input]
    ext
    simp [Vector.get_mapFinRange, Vector.get_map, Vector.rotate, Vector.get_rotate]

rw [h_holds, ← h_input]
    ext
    simp [Vector.rotate, Vector.get_map, Vector.get_mapFinRange]

rw [h_holds]
    apply Vector.ext
    intro i
    simp [Vector.get_mapFinRange, Vector.get_rotate, ←Vector.get_map, h_input]

simp [h_holds, h_input, Vector.map_map, ← Vector.get_map]
    ext
    simp [Vector.rotate]

rw [h_holds]
    ext
    simp [← Vector.get_map, h_input, Vector.get_rotate]

rw [h_holds, ← h_input]
    ext
    simp [Vector.get_rotate, Vector.get_map, Vector.get_mapFinRange]
